title: Safe, steady, mine.
subtitle: A three-word affirmation for anchoring a new baseline with money.
excerpt: A three-word affirmation from Day 21 of the MONEY program. Use to return quickly to a settled feeling about money, especially in the moments when the old panic flickers.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 21 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

practice.whenToUse: Use any time money anxiety flickers: checking the balance, opening a bill, seeing a price. Three words, said once, as a reset.

content.text: A three-word affirmation from Day 21 of the MONEY program. Short enough to use as an in-the-moment reset: when the balance is lower than expected, when the bill arrives, when the anxiety flickers before it builds.

Say it out loud three times in the morning, hand on heart. Use it again any time during the day when money anxiety activates: three words, said once or three times, as a deliberate return to the baseline you're building.
Adapted from Day 21 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
